entities.name: BHOOCHETANA
entities.description: A state-wide flagship program in Karnataka, India, designed to revive soils and improve agriculture through the scaling-out of best practices

entities.name: KARNATAKA
entities.description: A state in India where the agriculture sector experienced declining growth and the Bhoochetana program was implemented

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the state of Karnataka is located

entities.name: SOIL HEALTH
entities.description: The state of the soil which the Bhoochetana program aimed to address and revive to improve agricultural outcomes

entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The sector in Karnataka that faced stagnant to declining growth between 2000 and 2008 and was the target of the Bhoochetana program

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: A key agricultural metric that the Bhoochetana program aimed to increase to restore the state's agriculture

entities.name: AGRICULTURE-BASED LIVELIHOODS
entities.description: The economic means of living based on agriculture that the Bhoochetana program aimed to strengthen
